Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zakariel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Zakariel is known as the Fox and is a Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Zakariel raids Iterations under Vroshir assault to collect valuables.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Zakariel is a rival to the Angler of the Crystal Halls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Zakariel is the Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Zakariel is known as the Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Zakariel uses a dagger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Zakariel is an Abidan figure ordered to take a prisoner.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Zakariel is a Judge who wants Ozriel tossed in Haven.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel intends to contact Zakariel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Zakariel is a Judge who scampered away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Zakariel is a member of the Court of Seven known as the Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Zakariel is a person the Silverlord mentioned.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
